name: Symptoms started late after work slip, still claimable?

mainEntity.name: Symptoms started late after work slip, still claimable?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, delayed injuries qualify if linked to the fall by medical opinion.** Common in back/neck cases in Utah/Idaho.[1] Key factors: (1) See doctor soon; (2) Imaging shows progression; (3) Timeline documented. Don't delay reporting. Lawyer builds causation.
